title: CC8x8
description: A resource pack for CC: Tweaked that brings 8x8 textures to your computers.
body:
# CC8x8
CC8x8 is a **WIP** low-res 8x8 texture pack for [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked). It is ideally used with another 8x8 pack like [F8thful](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/f8thful).

![CC8x8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5be6d0047014ccff0a21bfa28310b5d6f8510ca4.png)

### Current Textures
- Computer & Advanced Computer
- Monitor & Advanced Monitor
- Pocket Computer & Advanced Pocket Computer
- Command Computer
- Disk Drive & Floppy Disks
- Printer, Printed Page(s) & Printed Book
- Speaker
- Wired and Wireless Modems
- Networking Cable
- Redstone Relay
### To Be Textured
- Turtles
### Not Currently Planned
- GUIs
